description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow includes a matrix of jobs testing on various Python versions, architectures, and environments across ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest. Each job checks out the code, sets up Python and CMake, installs requirements, configures and compiles the project, and runs tests. The workflow also includes a documentation job for building and checking documentation links.
